top_signals.title: Aluminum Set for Worst Monthly Loss Since 2008 on Supply Outlook
top_signals.summary: Aluminum headed for the steepest monthly loss since 2008 as expectations for a return of lost Middle Eastern supply saw it rapidly unwind an Iran war-induced rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US strikes Iranian missile, drone, radar sites
top_signals.summary: The U.S. struck Iranian missile, drone and radar sites on Friday, U.S. Central Command said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Ratchets Up Talk of Controlling Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: A top Iranian official has reiterated Tehran's determination to maintain control over maritime traffic moving through the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of fresh negotiations with the US. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale drives huge demand - and a potential headache for investors
top_signals.summary: SpaceX’s $25 billion debt sale drew heavy demand, but analysts warn of capital spending, refinancing and investor concentration risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Iran negotiators head to Doha, but meeting uncertain - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US and Iran negotiators head to Doha, but meeting uncertain  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Waymo and Uber end robotaxi pilot in Phoenix
top_signals.summary: The Waymo self-driving cars deployed in Phoenix for the Uber pilot will remain in use and make autonomous deliveries with DoorDash.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. Bank Freight Payment Index shows spot rates surging 31%
top_signals.summary:
The U.S. Bank Freight Payment Index Rates Edition shows dry van spot rates surged 31% year-over-year in May 2026 as capacity tightening drives costs higher.

The post U.S. Bank Freight Payment Index shows spot rates surging 31% appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
